comment: Generated from fleet-ops/config/agent-surfaces-registry.json — public product roots for hub link equity

products.name: CodeVetter
products.summary: Desktop-first AI code review workbench for agent-generated code. Local SQLite, Tauri shell, evidence-backed review — you

products.name: RolePatch
products.summary: AI-powered resume tailoring. Score fit against a job description, rewrite bullets for the role, and prep interviews.

products.name: High Signal
products.summary: Daily synthesized brief on technology, startups, and finance — five sections with inline hit-rates, no signup required.

products.name: Karte
products.summary: Link-in-bio registry for humans and AI agents. Publish trust cards with public manifests at /{slug}/agent.json.

products.name: Significant Hobbies
products.summary: Life planner for private daily rituals and public living — hobbies, bucket lists, and side quests over time.

products.name: Materia
products.summary: Evidence-graded reference for remedies organized by body part — body → condition → remedy → compound → study, with citat

products.name: Foundry (SaaS Maker)
products.summary: Sarthak Agrawal's personal product fleet showcase — RolePatch, High Signal, CodeVetter, Pace, PostTrainLLM, Karte, Signi

products.name: Starboard
products.summary: GitHub stars organizer with semantic search — sub-product of CodeVetter for repo intelligence.

products.name: EverythingRated
products.summary: Multi-axis rating tool for structured directories and catalogs — decisions with explicit trade-offs, not star averages.

products.name: TrueHire
products.summary: Hiring-side companion under RolePatch for evaluating candidates with structured role fit.

products.name: researchPapers
products.summary: Academic paper platform over a high-citation OpenAlex CS corpus — search, analytics, and RAG demo (~488k papers).

products.name: PostTrainLLM
products.summary: Mac-local LLM specialist factory — post-training and runtime that fits on one Mac, plus WebGPU playground.

products.name: Pace
products.summary: On-device Mac voice agent that reads your screen and acts with local context.

products.name: DRank
products.summary: Ahrefs Domain Rating tracker feeding High Signal /domains and fleet domain marketing work.

products.name: LoopTV
products.summary: TV-style random video player for lean-back browsing of curated channels.

products.name: MAL Explorer
products.summary: Anime and manga discovery with multi-axis filtering and watchlists.

products.name: Chess Coach
products.summary: AI-coached chess game for practice with coaching feedback.

products.name: Reader
products.summary: Research library: capture, annotate, and AI-chat over your reading — private by default.

products.name: Email Manager
products.summary: Gmail workspace with local semantic search — private email tooling.

products.name: AI Gateway
products.summary: OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway fronting free-tier models across multiple providers.

products.name: SWE Interview Prep
products.summary: SWE learning OS with FSRS spaced repetition, drills, and feedback.

products.name: psi-swarm
products.summary: Distributional Lighthouse / PageSpeed audits with grounded performance analysis across the fleet.

products.name: Protein Index
products.summary: Source-aware Indian protein product intelligence with nutrition, offers, and value comparisons.

products.name: Open Historia
products.summary: Interactive AI world simulator and story experiment.

products.name: Private Agent Search
products.summary: Cited search over project-scoped private corpora.

products.name: SaaS Ideas
products.summary: Scored catalog of SaaS ideas and product opportunities.
